description: Explore the legendary Bitcoin Pizza Day, where Laszlo Hynetz exchanged 10,000 BTC for two pizzas in 2010, now valued at $268 million. Celebrate with Binance Pizza events worldwide, giving away 5,000 pizzas.
topic_summary: This video recounts the story of Bitcoin Pizza Day, highlighting the monumental purchase of two pizzas for 10,000 BTC, and the global celebrations held by Binance in 2023, including the distribution of thousands of pizzas [t=59:93].
